reviews.review_description: Are there mod menu's, because is there were i could add it to my list of games with mod menu's and rate them all

reviews.review_title: Banned for HS but overall good
reviews.review_description: Was checking out the game when I was just banned for 999 hours while I was in a party and therefore could not have even said a word. The game has good slip slap tho.  Was banned by c4rtzz in game name is burg.

GREAT GAME

I met the owner and he is the nicest person ever he was so nice he added me on oculus and gave me finger painter! If you want to meet me I usually am in city with moderators
My name in game is Snowwy
The admins and the owner is very nice and  the game very good
I’ve been playing this game for so long and i think i shud get the stick

This gorilla tag fan game is amazing and has lots  of cool stuff from the past this game should be way more popular and it 8s in the Christmas 2021 update and I definitely think m9re people should play

developer_response.body: Thanks for the positive review! If you want any update suggestions, join our discord https://discord.gg/fHCPKYRX3J
Yes! One of my moderators (July) made a TikTok video on our game, so did one of our players (Hyper) made a video on our game too. Thanks for playing!

reviews.review_title: Please make me a admin I peg
reviews.review_description: Yooo I have played the game for a bit but a lot  of kids are saying sum racist words and make me a admin so I can ban them :) I peg you will probably say no tho :(

Nice gorilla tag fan game with good mods but please get better moderators they banned me for 999 hours when I joined the lobby saying that they were doing a show and I shouldn't be there but overall 5 stars for the whole game but im rating 4 because of the moderators

developer_response.body: Im redoing the moderators and everything, send me your username on discord #cartzz9748 so we can unban you :)

reviews.review_description: The owner was SO nice but I did meet a moderator called July and he was abusing his mod powers

reviews.review_title: Roll a tag fan game but I got banned
reviews.review_description: This game is a great game if you’re looking for then game of gorilla tag but I got banned sadly for toxicity I will do it again but yeah

Hello I’m NOX9 not to be rude or anything because I feel like I’m asking a lot but maybe I could get the stick and help out the community by stopping toxicity and racism or sexual jokes. -NOX9 Thank u
